name: Patient profile consensus
case_interpretation: The case is structurally severe but not currently high-symptom in the packaged visit fields.
open_questions: sex is not included in the local extract
challenge_received: Cross-domain challenge requests clearer safety boundaries and evidence mapping.
final_contribution: Keeps the plan proportional to symptoms and function.

name: Exercise rehabilitation
case_interpretation: Low-impact exercise, strengthening, balance, and stop rules are appropriate.
open_questions: current quadriceps strength is not packaged

revision: Added fall-prevention gate and pain >2 stop rule.

name: Weight and nutrition
case_interpretation: Aggressive weight loss is not indicated; nutrition should preserve muscle.
draft_recommendation: Maintain healthy weight and support activity.
challenge_received: Cross-domain challenge requests clearer safety boundaries and evidence mapping.
revision: Changed from weight-loss language to weight-stability and muscle preservation.

name: Medication and injection
case_interpretation: Medication is symptom-triggered; oral NSAID is not routine.
draft_recommendation: Topical option only during flare; no routine oral NSAID.
open_questions: complete medication list is not packaged
challenge_received: Cross-domain challenge requests clearer safety boundaries and evidence mapping.
final_contribution: Keeps analgesia supportive rather than dominant.

name: Self-management and behavior

name: Orthopaedic boundary

revision: Explicitly reserved referral for persistent clinically important burden.

name: Final synthesis
